title: pulmonaria montana subsp. montana
intro: Pulmonaria montana subsp. montana, also known as Lungwort, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the borage family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of Pulmonaria montana subsp. montana include its ability to soothe irritated mucous membranes, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. Pulmonaria montana subsp. montana can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote respiratory health and ease symptoms of colds and flu.
